summary: iter237k Daily Challenge PAID mode — Backend 9/9 PASS (re-run via pytest). Frontend partially validated: DailyChallengeBanner with 'Miser' CTA renders correctly on /games (NOT /feed as the review_request stated). Admin sub-tabs 'games-tab-quiz/tap/paid' all present under /admin → Quiz & Tap → Configuration. PaidDailyChallengeAdmin section enters 'Chargement...' state and never finishes loading within 4s — needs investigation. Full game-flow E2E (stake modal → playing → result) was not completed due to playwright flakiness with cookie-auth-dependent banner mount + repeated login resets.

minor.issue: today/period/total_revenue_usd returned as -0.0 (negative zero) — cosmetic float issue. Should be normalized to 0.0.

ui_bugs.issue: Sub-tab 'Défi Payant' (games-tab-paid) clicks correctly but content area shows 'Chargement...' indefinitely (>5s). Component testids paid-daily-challenge-admin / dcq-paid-toggle / dcq-stake-min etc never appeared in DOM during testing. Likely an axios call on mount throws/hangs. Needs verification — open browser devtools network tab on this view.

Banner is mounted in GamesModule at /games — review_request indicated /feed but that page does NOT contain the banner. The CTA 'Miser' is correctly displayed alongside 'Jouer maintenant' when the auth cookie/token is in place (verified in screenshot games_after_wait.png).

integration_issues.issue: Could not complete a full 5-question E2E playthrough via Playwright due to two factors: (a) banner sometimes returns null when status/config calls finish after the screenshot, (b) repeated /tmp/dcq_test_helper.py reset is needed between attempts. The presence of the 'Miser' button + GET /api/quiz/daily-challenge/paid/config returning 200 confirm wiring; backend tests prove the flow works end-to-end.

action_items: Investigate PaidDailyChallengeAdmin 'Chargement...' freeze — likely an unhandled axios error on mount. Add try/catch + setLoading(false) in the catch block. Verify GET /api/admin/daily-challenge/paid/config + /stats both return 200 from the browser session (they do via curl).
Re-run E2E for the user paid game flow when admin UI is fixed (one full playthrough Q1→Q5 + result modal validation).
Optional: clarify in review_request that DailyChallengeBanner lives on /games, not /feed.
critical_code_review_comments: DailyChallengeBanner.jsx loads /api/quiz/daily-challenge/status with withCredentials:true and silently swallows errors — when the call fails, both `data=null` and `loading=false`, so banner returns null silently. Consider adding a small error log to ease debugging.
PaidDailyChallengeAdmin appears to lack a graceful loading-error fallback (renders 'Chargement...' forever).
Backend route /api/quiz/daily-challenge/paid/config correctly merges latest in-progress session + today's revenue cap state.

All 18 expected admin testids (paid-daily-challenge-admin, dcq-paid-toggle, dcq-stake-min/max, dcq-daily-cap, dcq-time, dcq-score-5/4/3/2/01, dcq-paid-save, paid-stats, dcq-rev-today/period/total, dcq-pool-active, dcq-pool-refresh) are referenced in source — the issue is the component never finishes mounting in browser.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 PASS pytest, 4/4 admin endpoints 200 via curl)
success_rate.frontend: ~50% (banner + paid CTA + 3 sub-tabs OK; PaidDailyChallengeAdmin content + full game E2E NOT completed)

test_credentials: alice@japap.com/Alice2026! and admin@japap.com/JapapAdmin2024! both work. Captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 used for backend tests; frontend captcha is solved live via 'X+Y =' regex.
seed_data_creation: Used /tmp/dcq_test_helper.py user_317b6e0805a3 0 reset twice between tests to clear played_today. Pool of 30 questions remains intact (batch_id=999).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Path correction: DailyChallengeBanner is on /games (not /feed). To reach the paid admin: /admin → 'Quiz & Tap' top tab → 'Configuration' sub-tab → 'Défi Payant' (games-tab-paid). Reset Alice's session: python3 /tmp/dcq_test_helper.py user_317b6e0805a3 0 reset. Allow ≥6s after navigating to /games before checking banner — withCredentials cookies need to be set after the login form submit completes. The PaidDailyChallengeAdmin component is the critical bug to fix before retesting the admin toggle/save flow.
rca of the issue: PaidDailyChallengeAdmin stuck in loading: most likely the component sets loading=true initially and the API call (/admin/daily-challenge/paid/config or /stats) either throws synchronously, hits a CORS preflight failure, or its useEffect dependency array missing causes infinite re-fetch. From browser DevTools we'd confirm by checking the Network panel during the click. Curl tests against both endpoints with admin JWT return 200 with valid JSON, so the backend is fine; the issue is purely client-side (likely missing X-Requested-With header for CSRF on admin GET, OR an unhandled rejection). Recommend the main agent open the component, ensure all admin axios calls include withCredentials + X-Requested-With if needed, and add finally{setLoading(false)}.
